title: Frog (disambiguation)
content:
'''Frog''' might refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Frog]]''', a type of [[amphibian]]
**'''[[Klatooine paddy frog]]''', a species and a favored snack food of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]
**'''[[Arges frog]]''', a one-[[eye]]d species of frog found on multiple worlds
*"'''[[Frog Lady]]'''" and "'''[[Frog Man]]'''", two [[Querm Rybet]]
*[[Frog (language)|'''Frog''']], the language spoken by "[[Frog Lady]]" and "[[Frog Man]]"
*'''[[Frog-dog]]''', a [[Sentience|sentient]] species of lizard
==Legends==
*[[Frog/Legends|'''Frog''']], [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibian]] creature native to multiple worlds
*'''[[Dagobian frog tadpole]]''', creatures from [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]].
*[[List of phrases and slang/Legends#F|'''Fraidee-frog''']], [[Gungan Basic]] slang to describe a coward
*[[Frog-dog/Legends|'''Frog-dog''']], a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] species of lizard
*'''[[Frog rain]]''', a meteorological phenomenon in which frogs would "rain" from the sky.
*[[Klatooine paddy frog/Legends|'''Klatooine paddy frog''']], a species and a favored snack food of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]
* '''[[Nala tree frog]]''', a species native to [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]

==See also== 
*[[Yoda's species]]; [[George Lucas]] has jokingly referred to [[Yoda]] as a "frog"
